title: [kimi-review] 074cc10: [SEVERITY: medium] The claimed bound cannot be validated, an
description:
Commit: 074cc1067
Message: fix(coap): bound sync_word hex length in config parser

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The claimed bound cannot be validated, and `<= 6` looks suspect on its face: a 32-bit sync word needs up to 8 hex digits, and if the parsed string includes a `0x` prefix the effective digit limit is only 4. Without the code change in the commit (or even a test), there's no way to confirm the bound is correct and doesn't reject valid sync words.
